title: Fiery Smoky Russian Gochujang Tagine
description: A cozy Russian dish featuring a malty, snappy sauce made with gochujang and egg-free-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the clay tagine over medium heat.
Add the sliced onions and cook until they start to soften.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the chicken thighs and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the gochujang, chicken broth, cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, black pepper, and thyme.
Stir to combine and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Cover the tagine and transfer it to the oven.
Bake at 300°F for 30 minutes, then increase the oven temperature to 400°F and bake for another 20 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Remove the tagine from the oven and stir in the butter until melted.
Serve the Fiery Smoky Russian Gochujang Tagine hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
